SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.title: Mirror Mirror
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.d: Mirror, mirror on the wall, who is the most pain in the ass event of them all?
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.o: Choose 1 of 6 cards from the Altered World to add to your deck.
Replace yourself with your altered version. (TODO: -> Triple and gain both other choices.)

SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.REPLACED_: Take {ReplaceCharSelect} of {ReplaceCharCount} cards from your alter
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.GAINED_MA: You walked away without interacting with the mirror
